attacks.name: Delta Circle
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Pokemon you have in play that has δ on its card.

attacks.name: Split Bomb
attacks.text: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokemon. This attack does 30 damage to each of them.

tests.name: delta_circle_scales
tests.description: Test Delta Circle adds +10 per delta Pokemon in play

tests.name: split_bomb_double_snipe
tests.description: Test Split Bomb does 30 to 2 chosen Pokemon
